title: T-080 — risks table + V18 built-blocker trigger (NPD-i)
prompt:
# T-080 — Risk register schema + V18 trigger

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §18
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create risks table per §18 DDL with score generated col + bucket generated col + indexes + RLS, plus a Postgres trigger enforcing V18: cannot transition fa.built FALSE→TRUE while any risks row with bucket='High' AND state='Open' exists.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0080_risks_v18.sql per §18 DDL: risks (id PK, tenant_id, product_code FK fa ON DELETE CASCADE, title CHECK 3-300 chars, description CHECK 10-500 chars, likelihood INT 1-3, impact INT 1-3, score GENERATED ALWAYS AS (likelihood*impact) STORED, bucket GENERATED ALWAYS AS CASE STORED, state default Open, mitigation, owner_user_id, closed_at, R13 audit cols).
2. Indexes: (tenant_id, product_code, state) + (tenant_id, bucket) WHERE state='Open'.
3. Trigger fa_built_v18_check on product BEFORE UPDATE — RAISE EXCEPTION when NEW.built=TRUE and OLD.built=FALSE and EXISTS risks WHERE product_code=NEW.product_code AND bucket='High' AND state='Open'.
4. RLS + Drizzle schema + barrel.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0080_risks_v18.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/risks.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/risks-v18.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0080 runs and a risks row with likelihood=3, impact=3 exists, when SELECT score, bucket FROM risks runs, then score=9 and bucket='High' (generated cols correct) per §18 score formula
2. Given a product row with built=FALSE and one Open High-bucket risk, when an UPDATE product SET built=TRUE runs, then it fails with V18_HIGH_RISK_OPEN error per §18 V18 contract
3. Given an INSERT risks with description='short' (len<10) is attempted, then it fails CHECK constraint per §18 DDL

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/risks-v18.test.ts asserting generated cols + V18 trigger + CHECK + RLS before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test risks-v18'

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement V18 in app code (must be DB trigger to honour all entry paths)
- Do not skip generated cols (must be GENERATED ALWAYS STORED)
- Do not allow downgrading built TRUE→FALSE silently — separate audit

pipeline_inputs.details: Migration emits the table verbatim per §18 DDL plus the BEFORE UPDATE trigger on product enforcing V18 across all write paths.
